metadata.title: Alberto | Software Engineer
metadata.description: Alberto's personal site — software engineer specialized in operational improvement through software.

hero.name: Alberto
hero.title: Software Engineer
hero.subtitle: I build digital products designed to reflect a vision and evolve over time.

handbook.title: HandbookAI Interview
handbook.description: AI-assisted workflow design app. FastAPI backend, Next.js frontend, and OpenAI integration.

colorEvolve.title: Color Evolve
colorEvolve.description: Color palette optimizer using genetic algorithms to meet WCAG AA/AAA standards.

spiceSnap.title: Spice Snap
spiceSnap.description: Spice detection with deep learning and computer vision.

treeCalc.title: TreeCalc
treeCalc.description: Calculator that visualizes math expressions as syntax trees with real-time token analysis.

letterGame.title: Letter Game
letterGame.description: Real-time typing game with falling letters. Uses Web Workers for better runtime performance.

barhalla.title: Barhalla MVP
barhalla.description: Marketplace app for finding nearby barbers.

about.sectionTitle: A little about who I am
about.body: I like building software with intent: products that solve real problems, feel clear to the people using them, and can evolve without becoming fragile. I work well where engineering, product judgment, and operational improvement meet.

product.title: Product engineering
product.body: I think from architecture and data through interaction, performance, and delivery.

taste.title: Design judgment
taste.body: I care about spacing, hierarchy, and motion so interfaces feel calm.

systems.title: Systems and process
systems.body: I like turning complex operations into simple, measurable, maintainable flows.

contact.description: Have something in mind? Find me on social media or reach out directly via email.

blog.metadataDescription: Essays and notes on product engineering, design craft, and calm software.
blog.title: Notes on craft, design & shipping.
blog.description: I write about the things I learn building products: the details that make software feel calm, and the systems behind teams that ship great work.

blogPost.name: Name
blogPost.emptyComments: No comments yet. Be the first to share your thoughts.
blogPost.validation: Please add your name and a comment.
